headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Said To Just Go Buy It
summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is one of the Jim Cramer’s Hottest Robotics and Physical AI Stock Picks. Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is one of the leading robotics companies in the medical space. Its shares are down by 7.8% over the past year but are up by 23% since Cramer discussed them on Squawk on the […]
